{{nihongo|'''Usutakihimeinochi Shrine'''|宇須多伎比売命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Usutakihimeinochi Shrine'''|宇須多伎比売命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Usutakihimeinochi Shrine'''|宇須多伎比売命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Usutakihimeinochi Shrine'''|宇須多伎比売命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Usutakihimeinochi Shrine'''|宇須多伎比売命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].
